/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/EBO.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/VAO.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/VBO.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/camera.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/glad.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/model.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/shaderClass.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/stb.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gltf-viewer.dir/src/texture.cpp.o" -o gltf-viewer  /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib64/libGL.so
